steps.title: Substitute the time
steps.content:
The equation gives speed after $t$ seconds. For $5$ seconds, substitute $t=5$ into the equation $s=45+3t$:

$$s=45+3(5)$$

steps.title: Compute the speed
steps.content:
Finish the calculation:

$$s=45+15=60$$

So the vehicle's speed after $5$ seconds is $60$ miles per hour. The answer is D.
